Event: Spicy Mole-opoly
Event Date: 26/05/2026
Sage Bot Item Code: S37
The Chosen Rider Sword

When attacking, has a 30% chance of restoring 16% health in self.
Once in a while, the unit deals a crushing blow to the attack target and all enemy units in a large radius around it. The enemy units receive pure damage equal to 225% of the sword wielder's physical armor. This damage ignores shields and damage-reducing effects. All positive effects are also removed from the targets, and the the targets are frozen for 4 sec. For that duration, the frozen units are unable to move or attack, and the cooldown of all their gear and artifact abilities is increased by 4 sec.

Requirements: 98-100

User rating: item not rated yet

First trigger: 5 sec
